name: Shrimp with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté shrimp for 2-3 minutes or until opaque. Remove from the skillet and keep warm.
2. Add shallot and garlic to the skillet and sauté for 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
3. Add sun-dried tomatoes and sauté for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Add white wine and cook until the liquid is reduced by half.
5. Stir in heavy cream and cook until the sauce thickens.
6. Return shrimp to the skillet and stir in parsley and pepper. Mix well.
7. Serve immediately.
